reference: I have had one of those little white bumps on my tongue all week. It has started to go away, but I was using my mouthwash today and noticed that the veins under my tongue were very dark and a little swollen. Should I be worried? I am fifty-five years old, five feet four inches tall, and two hundred and thirty pounds.
